title: Phishing Response
steps: Validate the sender, subject line, and delivery path.
Review embedded links or attachments in a sandboxed context.
Contact the user to confirm interaction and collect timeline details.
Block malicious indicators and contain impacted accounts if needed.

title: Impossible Travel Response
steps: Verify the user's recent travel or VPN usage.
Review MFA prompts, device posture, and session history.
Reset credentials and revoke sessions if the activity is untrusted.
Escalate if the account is privileged or business critical.

title: Failed Login Triage
steps: Check whether the account owner expected authentication failures.
Look for lockout, spray, or brute force patterns across assets.
Confirm whether the source is known or suspicious.
Escalate if repeated failures target privileged accounts.

title: Malware Containment
steps: Validate the detection and isolate the host if confidence is high.
Review recent process, file, and network activity on the asset.
Preserve key evidence before cleanup steps.
Confirm recovery actions and close only after clean rescans.

title: PowerShell Abuse Review
steps: Inspect the command line, parent process, and execution policy.
Look for encoded commands or outbound connections.
Assess whether the behavior matches expected admin activity.
Escalate if privilege abuse or persistence is suspected.

title: Privilege Escalation Response
steps: Validate the privilege change event and affected identity.
Review adjacent admin actions, tickets, and approvals.
Contain the account or host if the change is unauthorized.
Escalate immediately for privileged admin assets.
